marketplace_entry.name: pr-review-toolkit
marketplace_entry.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

marketplace_entry.name: prisma
marketplace_entry.description: Prisma MCP integration for Postgres database management, schema migrations, SQL queries, and connection string management. Provision Prisma Postgres databases, run migrations, and interact with your data directly.

marketplace_entry.name: pydantic-ai
marketplace_entry.description: Write accurate Pydantic AI code from the start. Up-to-date patterns, decision trees, and common gotchas for agents, tools, structured output, streaming, and multi-agent apps.

marketplace_entry.name: pyright-lsp
marketplace_entry.description: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

marketplace_entry.name: qdrant-skills
marketplace_entry.description: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search covering scaling, performance optimization, search quality, monitoring, deployment, model migration, version upgrades, and SDK usage across Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go, .NET, and Java.

marketplace_entry.name: qodo-skills
marketplace_entry.description: Qodo Skills provides a curated library of reusable AI agent capabilities that extend Claude's functionality for software development workflows. Each skill is designed to integrate seamlessly into your development process, enabling tasks like code quality checks, automated testing, security scanning, and compliance validation. Skills operate across your entire SDLC—from IDE to CI/CD—ensuring consistent standards and catching issues early.

marketplace_entry.name: qt-development-skills
marketplace_entry.description: Agentic engineering skills for Qt software development — Qt C++/QML code review, QML coding, and Qt C++/QML code documentation.

marketplace_entry.name: quarkus-agent
marketplace_entry.description: MCP server for AI coding agents to create, manage, and interact with Quarkus applications. Provides tools for project scaffolding, dev mode lifecycle, extension skills, Dev MCP proxy, and documentation search.

marketplace_entry.name: railway
marketplace_entry.description: Deploy and manage apps, databases, and infrastructure on Railway. Covers project setup, deploys, environment configuration, networking, troubleshooting, and monitoring.

marketplace_entry.name: ralph-loop
marketplace_entry.description: Interactive self-referential AI loops for iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Claude works on the same task repeatedly, seeing its previous work, until completion.

marketplace_entry.name: rc
marketplace_entry.description: Configure RevenueCat projects, apps, products, entitlements, and offerings directly from Claude Code. Manage your in-app purchase backend without leaving your development workflow.

marketplace_entry.name: redis-development
marketplace_entry.description: Redis development best practices — data structures, query engine, vector search, caching, and performance optimization

marketplace_entry.name: remember
marketplace_entry.description: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Extracts, summarizes, and compresses conversations into tiered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

marketplace_entry.name: resend
marketplace_entry.description: Agent skills for working with Resend to send and receive emails — email API integration, agent inbox, CLI, React Email components, and deliverability best practices. Includes the Resend MCP server.

marketplace_entry.name: revenuecat
marketplace_entry.description: Configure RevenueCat projects, apps, products, entitlements, and offerings directly from Claude Code. Manage your in-app purchase backend without leaving your development workflow.

marketplace_entry.name: rootly
marketplace_entry.description: Full-lifecycle incident management: deploy safety, incident response, on-call management, and retrospectives.

marketplace_entry.name: ruby-lsp
marketplace_entry.description: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

marketplace_entry.name: runway-api

marketplace_entry.name: rust-analyzer-lsp
marketplace_entry.description: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

marketplace_entry.name: sanity

marketplace_entry.name: sap-cds-mcp
marketplace_entry.description: AI-assisted development of SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) projects. Search CDS models and CAP documentation.

marketplace_entry.name: sap-fiori-mcp-server

marketplace_entry.name: sap-mdk-server
marketplace_entry.description: MCP server for SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). Build and modify MDK applications with AI assistance — schema lookups, action validation, rule editing, and project scaffolding.

marketplace_entry.name: save-to-spotify
marketplace_entry.description: Create polished audio episodes with TTS narration, rich timelines, cover images, and save them to Spotify via the save-to-spotify CLI.

marketplace_entry.name: security-guidance
marketplace_entry.description: Security review for Claude-generated code. Pattern-based warnings on edits, LLM-powered diff review on Stop, and an agentic commit reviewer that catches injection, XSS, SSRF, hardcoded secrets, and 25+ other vulnerability classes.

marketplace_entry.name: semgrep
marketplace_entry.description: Semgrep catches security vulnerabilities in real-time and guides Claude to write secure code from the start.

marketplace_entry.name: sentry
marketplace_entry.description: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

marketplace_entry.name: sentry-cli
marketplace_entry.description: Skills for using the Sentry CLI to interact with Sentry from the command line

marketplace_entry.name: serena

marketplace_entry.name: servicenow-sdk
marketplace_entry.description: Create, edit, and deploy ServiceNow applications with the Fluent SDK effortlessly through Claude AI.

marketplace_entry.name: session-report
marketplace_entry.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

marketplace_entry.name: shopify
marketplace_entry.description: Shopify developer tools for Claude Code — search Shopify docs, generate and validate GraphQL, Liquid, and UI extension code

marketplace_entry.name: shopify-ai-toolkit
marketplace_entry.description: Shopify's AI Toolkit provides 18 development skills for building on the Shopify platform, covering documentation search, API schema access, GraphQL and Liquid code validation, Hydrogen storefronts, Polaris UI extensions, store management via CLI, and onboarding guidance for both developers and merchants.

marketplace_entry.name: skill-creator
marketplace_entry.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

marketplace_entry.name: slack
marketplace_entry.description: Slack workspace integration. Search messages, access channels, read threads, and stay connected with your team's communications while coding. Find relevant discussions and context quickly.

marketplace_entry.name: snowflake-cortex-code
marketplace_entry.description: Automatically route Snowflake prompts from Claude Code to Cortex Code for execution. Provides slash commands for code review and task delegation, plus skills for routing, run, and setup.

marketplace_entry.name: sonarqube
marketplace_entry.description: Automatically enforce SonarQube code quality and security in the agent coding loop — 7,000+ rules, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages. PostToolUse hooks run analysis after every file edit. Pre-tool secrets scanning prevents 450+ patterns from reaching the LLM. Slash commands give on-demand access to quality gate status, coverage, duplication, and dependency risks. Includes SonarQube CLI, MCP Server, skills, hooks, and slash commands.

marketplace_entry.name: sonatype-guide
marketplace_entry.description: Sonatype Guide MCP server for software supply chain intelligence and dependency security. Analyze dependencies for vulnerabilities, get secure version recommendations, and check component quality metrics.

marketplace_entry.name: sourcegraph
marketplace_entry.description: Code search and understanding across codebases. Search, read, and trace references across repositories; analyze refactor impact; investigate incidents via commit and diff search; run targeted security sweeps.

marketplace_entry.name: spotify-ads-api
marketplace_entry.description: Manage Spotify ad campaigns with natural language. Create campaigns, ad sets, ads, pull reports, and handle OAuth — all through conversation.

marketplace_entry.name: stripe
marketplace_entry.description: Stripe development plugin for Claude

marketplace_entry.name: sumup
marketplace_entry.description: SumUp payment integrations across terminal and online checkout flows. Build Android and iOS POS apps with SumUp card readers, online checkout with server SDKs and the checkout widget, and control card readers remotely via Cloud API.

marketplace_entry.name: supabase
marketplace_entry.description: Supabase MCP integration for database operations, authentication, storage, and real-time subscriptions. Manage your Supabase projects, run SQL queries, and interact with your backend directly.

marketplace_entry.name: superpowers
marketplace_entry.description: Superpowers teaches Claude brainstorming, subagent driven development with built in code review, systematic debugging, and red/green TDD. Additionally, it teaches Claude how to author and test new skills.

marketplace_entry.name: swift-lsp
marketplace_entry.description: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

marketplace_entry.name: teamcity-cli

marketplace_entry.name: telegram
marketplace_entry.description: Telegram messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

marketplace_entry.name: terraform
marketplace_entry.description: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

marketplace_entry.name: togetherai-skills
marketplace_entry.description: Agent Skills for Together AI platform — inference, training, embeddings, audio, video, images, function calling, and infrastructure. Covers serverless chat completions, image/video generation, fine-tuning, batch inference, evaluations, sandboxes, dedicated endpoints, and GPU clusters.

marketplace_entry.name: twilio-developer-kit
marketplace_entry.description: Twilio Skills provide procedural knowledge for AI coding agents — which APIs to use, in what order, and what to avoid. Covers SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, Verify, SendGrid, Compliance, and 30+ products.

marketplace_entry.name: typescript-lsp
marketplace_entry.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

marketplace_entry.name: ui5

marketplace_entry.name: ui5-typescript-conversion
marketplace_entry.description: SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 plugin for coding agents. Convert JavaScript based UI5 projects to TypeScript.

marketplace_entry.name: vanta-mcp-plugin
marketplace_entry.description: The Vanta plugin connects Claude Code to Vanta's security and compliance platform through the Vanta MCP server. It combines Vanta's test-specific remediation intelligence with your local repository context to help you fix compliance failures faster.

marketplace_entry.name: vercel
marketplace_entry.description: Vercel deployment platform integration. Manage deployments, check build status, access logs, configure domains, and control your frontend infrastructure directly from Claude Code.

marketplace_entry.name: windsor-ai
marketplace_entry.description: Connect Claude Code to 325+ business data sources via Windsor.ai. Query marketing, sales, CRM, ecommerce, finance, and analytics data from Google Ads, Meta, HubSpot, Salesforce, Shopify, Stripe, and hundreds more — directly from your terminal.

marketplace_entry.name: wix
marketplace_entry.description: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. CLI development skills for dashboard extensions, backend APIs, site widgets, and service plugins with the Wix Design System, plus MCP server for site management.

marketplace_entry.name: wordpress.com
marketplace_entry.description: Uses Claude Code to create and edit WordPress sites with WordPress Studio before deploying changes to your WordPress.com site.

marketplace_entry.name: workos
marketplace_entry.description: WorkOS integration skills for AuthKit, SSO, Directory Sync, RBAC, Vault, Audit Logs, migrations, and API references.

marketplace_entry.name: youdotcom-agent-skills
marketplace_entry.description: You.com agent skills for web search, research with citations, and content extraction. Guided integrations for Vercel AI SDK, Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, crewAI, LangChain, Microsoft Teams.ai, direct REST API, and bash CLI.

marketplace_entry.name: zapier
marketplace_entry.description: Connect 8,000+ apps to your AI workflow. Discover, enable, and execute Zapier actions directly from your client.

marketplace_entry.name: zilliz
marketplace_entry.description: Zilliz Cloud management plugin with 14 skills covering cluster lifecycle, collection schema, vector search, index tuning, bulk import, RBAC, backups, and monitoring.

marketplace_entry.name: zoom-plugin
marketplace_entry.description: Claude plugin for planning, building, and debugging Zoom integrations across REST APIs, SDKs, webhooks, bots, and MCP workflows.

marketplace_entry.name: zoominfo
marketplace_entry.description: Search companies and contacts, enrich leads, find lookalikes, and get AI-ranked contact recommendations. Pre-built skills chain multiple ZoomInfo tools into complete B2B sales workflows.

marketplace_entry.name: zscaler
marketplace_entry.description: Manage Zscaler cloud security platform including ZPA (private access), ZIA (internet access), ZDX (digital experience), ZCC (client connector), EASM (attack surface), and Z-Insights (analytics). Create and manage policies, troubleshoot connectivity, audit security configurations, and investigate incidents across the full Zscaler ecosystem.
